arts.ttl: Police arrest 10 Man United fans after an organised BRAWL on a wasteland with Dutch supporters ahead of clash against FC Twente - as force send warning before Manchester derby
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: In startling scenes sources have compared to the dark days of the 1980s, two groups of around 40 balaclava-wearing thugs started battling in Lower Broughton, Salford.

arts.ttl: Preview: Olympiacos vs. FC Twente - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Olympiacos and FC Twente, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
